agents.name: Rex
agents.note: Sprint 26 / Session 176 -- US-300 SHIPPED passes:true. v0007_sync_history_retention.py (idempotent DELETE FROM sync_history WHERE started_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 90 DAY for MariaDB) + registered in ALL_MIGRATIONS + 30 tests across 6 classes mirroring v0005 FakeRunner pattern. RETENTION_DAYS_DEFAULT=90 + SYNC_HISTORY_RETENTION_DAYS env override (garbage/non-positive falls back to default). Pre-flight RED was the cleanest possible (ImportError on missing module before collection). Verification: 30/30 new GREEN; 656/657 server suite GREEN; 4093/4129 fast suite GREEN; ruff clean; sprint_lint clean (0/0 across 9 stories). Sprint 26 9/9 SHIPPED -- emitting <promise>COMPLETE</promise>. Out-of-scope file touched: src/server/migrations/__init__.py registry edit (intrinsic to ship-a-new-migration; matches v0001-v0006 precedent + scope.acceptance criterion 2). BL-010 closed in fact: nine-story sprint capped without any phantom-path drift this iteration. Three test fidelity discriminators worth preserving for future retention/migration stories: (1) FakeRunner test surface is uniform across v0004/v0005/v0006/v0007 -- copy the helpers verbatim + customize handlers; (2) post-probe SchemaProbeError on count>0 catches the silent-no-op class even when the runner says returncode=0; (3) word-boundary regex `\bsync_log\b` discriminates against the BL-010 bug-class regression in a way substring search would miss (`sync_history` contains `sync_h`, not `sync_log`). Closed Sprint 26.

agents.name: Agent2
agents.note: Sprint 25 / Session 158 -- US-286 SHIPPED passes:true. tests/pi/integration/test_engine_drive_capture_e2e.py (1 class / 1 test / 7 phases): real ApplicationOrchestrator + DriveDetector + SummaryRecorder + ObdDataLogger; mock surface = connection.obd.query (BT edge) only; 0.16s call duration vs 30-sec budget. Mirrors US-260 cold-start pattern. Discriminator: would FAIL against May-4-5 production regression class (DriveDetector never operational) + against any silent realtime_data write regression. Two gotchas surfaced for future tests: (1) e2e fixtures must seed profiles('daily') because realtime_data has FK + bare orchestrator doesn't run ProfileManager; (2) production order query->logReading->_handleReading means first N ticks land with drive_id NULL -- query realtime_data without drive_id filter. Standing by post-US-286.
